audit_items.proof_trace: `_getAssetOutAmount` takes `amountIn` (caller-specified bid amount) as a parameter and computes `auctionUsdValue = amountIn * assetInUsdPrice / decimals * priceMultiplier` — no `balanceOf` call inside. In `bid()`, `availableBalance` is read only as a cap check (revert if `amount > availableBalance`); the user-specified `amount` is passed directly to `_getAssetOutAmount`, so depositing extra tokens cannot alter the per-unit price or inject balance into the calculation.
